source_text: In all handshakes, the server MUST send the EncryptedExtensions message immediately after the ServerHello message.
rule_statement: The server MUST send EncryptedExtensions immediately after ServerHello in all handshakes.
checkability_rationale: Can verify message ordering in handshake transcript.
extraction_confidence_rationale: Explicit MUST with clear ordering requirement.

source_text: The client MUST check EncryptedExtensions for the presence of any forbidden extensions and if any are found MUST abort the handshake with an "illegal_parameter" alert.
rule_statement: The client MUST check EncryptedExtensions for forbidden extensions and abort with illegal_parameter if any are found.
checkability_rationale: Can verify client checks extension placement against the table in §4.2.
ambiguity_notes: Forbidden extensions are those not listed for EE in the §4.2 table.
